prefillPrompt: What should I fix in my Google Ads campaigns?

hero.headline: Claude is smart. Toffu knows your campaigns.
hero.subhead: Claude can't see your ad accounts. Toffu connects to Google Ads, Meta, and GA4 out of the box. Ask what to fix. It fixes it.

demo.content: What should I fix in my Google Ads campaigns?

**Google Ads Audit, Last 30 Days**
Total spend: $18,430 | Conversions: 204 | Average CPA: $90.34

---

**3 Issues Found**

1. **Campaign "Brand - Exact"** has $4,200 spend, CPA $210 (target $60)
   Bid strategy switched to Max Conversions 3 weeks ago. Recommend reverting to Target CPA $60.

2. **Ad group "Competitor Terms"** spent $1,800 with 0 conversions in 14 days.
   Recommend pausing.

3. **6 keywords** with Quality Score below 4 dragging up CPCs by an estimated 22%.
   Recommend pausing and rewriting landing page copy.

---

**I can fix these now.** Say go and I'll pause the dead ad group, revert the bid strategy, and flag the low-QS keywords.

findings.kicker: The problem with Claude for ads
findings.title: Claude doesn't know your campaigns exist.

items.title: No account access
items.desc: Claude has no connection to Google Ads, Meta, or GA4. Every session starts from zero. You paste data. It responds. Then it forgets.

items.title: Manual context every time
items.desc: To get useful output from Claude, you need to export data, write a prompt, paste it in, and interpret the response. That's not a workflow. That's extra work.

items.title: Advice only, no execution
items.desc: Even when Claude gives good recommendations, it can't act on them. You still have to go into the platform, find the right setting, and make the change.

items.title: No campaign history
items.desc: Claude doesn't know what changed last week, what you tested last month, or what your CPA target is. Toffu remembers everything across every session.

items.title: No integrations
items.desc: Claude works on text you give it. Toffu is connected to your stack: Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, Search Console, and more. Live data, every time.

items.title: You still do the work
items.desc: Claude makes you smarter. Toffu makes you faster. It pulls the data, finds the problem, and executes the fix, without you leaving the chat.

howItWorks.title: Connect once. Ask anything. Toffu acts.

steps.title: Connect your accounts
steps.desc: Link Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, and more in under 5 minutes. No manual exports, no copy-paste. Toffu reads your live data directly.

steps.title: Ask what to fix
steps.desc: Type a question like you would to a colleague. Toffu pulls the data, finds the issue, and tells you exactly what's wrong and why.

steps.title: Toffu executes it
steps.desc: Pause a campaign, change a bid strategy, update ad copy. Toffu doesn't just advise, it makes the change with your approval.

afterSection.title: Your first audit takes 60 seconds.
afterSection.subhead: Most users find wasted spend on day one.

items.title: Instant campaign audit
items.desc: Toffu reads every campaign, ad set, and keyword and surfaces the ones spending without results.

items.title: Specific fixes, not generic tips
items.desc: Not 'check your quality scores'. Toffu tells you which 6 keywords to pause and why, with the numbers to back it up.

items.title: One-click execution
items.desc: Approve the recommendation and Toffu makes the change. No platform-switching, no second tool.

items.title: Ongoing monitoring
items.desc: Set up daily or weekly checks. Toffu alerts you when something breaks before you notice it in the numbers.

faq.question: Can't I just use Claude with a copy-pasted export?
faq.answer: You can, but it's slow, manual, and you lose context the moment you close the tab. Toffu is connected to your live accounts, so you never start from scratch.

faq.question: What platforms does Toffu connect to?
faq.answer: Google Ads, Meta Ads, Google Analytics 4, Search Console, LinkedIn Ads, and more. All connected in one place.

faq.question: Does Toffu make changes automatically?
faq.answer: No. Toffu always shows you what it plans to do and asks for approval before executing anything. You stay in control.

faq.question: How long does setup take?
faq.answer: Under 5 minutes. Connect your accounts via OAuth, no API keys or manual configuration needed.

faq.question: Is this just for Google Ads?
faq.answer: No. Toffu works across all your connected channels. Ask about Meta spend, GA4 traffic, Search Console rankings, or all of them at once.

finalCta.title: Your campaigns are running right now.
finalCta.subhead: Toffu can read them in 60 seconds and tell you exactly what to fix. Claude can't.

seo.title: Claude vs Toffu for Ad Management | Toffu AI
seo.description: Claude is smart but it can't see your ad accounts. Toffu connects to Google Ads, Meta, and GA4 out of the box. Ask what to fix. It fixes it.
seo.ogDescription: Toffu connects to your ad accounts out of the box. No exports, no prompts, no manual work. Just ask what to fix.
